subject: chemistry
title: 17M.3.SL.TZ2.11
question_html: Suggest, in terms of its structure, why vitamin D is fat-soluble using section 35 of the data booklet.
solution_html:
«mostly» non-polar
OR
hydrocarbon backbone
OR
only 1 hydroxyl «group so mostly non-polar»

 

Accept “alcohol/hydroxy” for “hydroxyl” but not “hydroxide”.

[1 mark]
